title: Discovery Compass makes intent editable and feedback immediately visible.
narrative_role: Chosen solution, interaction flow, why it works, and edge cases
objective: Explain the complete product interaction, the AI/deterministic boundary, and how the design addresses the evidence-backed mechanism.

interaction_steps.name: Anchor
interaction_steps.system_behavior: Create a lightweight, explicit taste reference without Spotify login

interaction_steps.name: Express
interaction_steps.user_action: Describe what fits now in one sentence
interaction_steps.system_behavior: Parse mood, activity, genre, language, energy, novelty, and exclusions

interaction_steps.name: Approve
interaction_steps.user_action: Edit the interpretation and set novelty

interaction_steps.name: Explore
interaction_steps.user_action: Review 8–12 ranked candidates with short fit explanations
interaction_steps.system_behavior: Apply deterministic exclusions, relevance, novelty, repeat penalties, artist caps, and diversity

interaction_steps.name: Steer
interaction_steps.user_action: Save, reject, request more like this, or increase adventure
interaction_steps.system_behavior: Rerank immediately and state what changed

why_this_solution_should_work: It adds the missing current-session signal without discarding the useful persistent taste anchor.
A visible novelty control resolves the comfort-versus-exploration tension instead of forcing novelty.
Hard exclusions and repeat penalties directly address unwanted contexts and recurring tracks.
Immediate reranking makes cause and effect visible, reducing the feeling that feedback is ignored.
A paired baseline isolates the incremental value of the guided mechanism.

ai_does: Parse flexible language into an approved schema
deterministic_system_does: Diversity, artist caps, ranking, assignment, and metrics
ai_boundary.fallback: Direct controls and deterministic explanation templates keep the session usable without an AI call.

edge_cases.behavior: Show unresolved terms; require an edit before ranking
Never relax exclusions silently; show the conflicting constraints
Use direct fields and grounded templates
Allow familiar-adjacent novelty and baseline condition
Bound session iterations, preserve hard constraints, prevent track return
Say ‘new relative to your selected profile,’ never ‘new to you’
Disclose coverage; test interaction mechanics rather than catalog breadth

visuals.alt: Listener selects anchors, enters and approves intent, deterministic ranker returns candidates, and feedback updates the session.

speaker_notes: AI sits at the language boundary; it does not secretly choose tracks or decide experiment outcomes.
The most important UX is the visible change summary after feedback, not a long chat response.
The prototype is already implemented locally, but study readiness remains gated.
